Class SwingTask<T>

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal.SwingTask<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The result type produced by the background task.
public class SwingTask<T> extends Object
A robust, high-performance background task execution unit for the Anahata ASI.

Unlike standard SwingWorker, SwingTask executes on the professional, named thread pools managed by the Agi or AbstractAsiContainer. This ensures perfect isolation, diagnostic clarity (thread names match sessions), and eliminates contention with generic JDK background tasks.

Lifecycle: Call start() to register the task and begin execution. Success and error callbacks are guaranteed to run on the Event Dispatch Thread (EDT).

Author:
anahata

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SwingTask(AbstractAsiContainerPanel containerPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask)
    Constructs a SwingTask bound to the global Container dashboard with default settings.
    SwingTask(AbstractAsiContainerPanel containerPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask, Consumer<T> onDone)

    Constructs a SwingTask bound to the global Container dashboard.

  • Constructor Details

    • SwingTask

      public SwingTask(AgiPanel agiPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask, Consumer<T> onDone, Consumer<Exception> onError, boolean showError)
      Constructs a SwingTask bound to a specific Agi session. Uses the Agi's dedicated thread pool.
      Parameters:
      agiPanel - The parent Agi UI.
      taskName - Descriptive name.
      backgroundTask - Logic to run in background.
      onDone - Success callback (EDT).
      onError - Error callback (EDT).
      showError - Whether to show error dialog.

    • SwingTask

      public SwingTask(AgiPanel agiPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask, Consumer<T> onDone, Consumer<Exception> onError)
      Constructs a SwingTask bound to a specific Agi session with default settings.
      Parameters:
      agiPanel - The parent Agi UI.
      taskName - Descriptive name.
      backgroundTask - Logic to run in background.
      onDone - Success callback (EDT).
      onError - Error callback (EDT).

    • SwingTask

      public SwingTask(AgiPanel agiPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask, Consumer<T> onDone)
      Constructs a SwingTask bound to a specific Agi session with only a success callback.
      Parameters:
      agiPanel - The parent Agi UI.
      taskName - Descriptive name.
      backgroundTask - Logic to run in background.
      onDone - Success callback (EDT).

    • SwingTask

      public SwingTask(AgiPanel agiPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask)
      Constructs a minimal SwingTask bound to a specific Agi session.
      Parameters:
      agiPanel - The parent Agi UI.
      taskName - Descriptive name.
      backgroundTask - Logic to run in background.

    • SwingTask

      public SwingTask(AbstractAsiContainerPanel containerPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask, Consumer<T> onDone, Consumer<Exception> onError, boolean showError)
      Constructs a SwingTask bound to the global Container dashboard. Uses the container's shared infrastructure thread pool.
      Parameters:
      containerPanel - The parent container dashboard UI.
      taskName - Descriptive name.
      backgroundTask - Logic to run in background.
      onDone - Success callback (EDT).
      onError - Error callback (EDT).
      showError - Whether to show error dialog.

    • SwingTask

      public SwingTask(AbstractAsiContainerPanel containerPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask, Consumer<T> onDone, Consumer<Exception> onError)
      Constructs a SwingTask bound to the global Container dashboard.
      Parameters:
      containerPanel - The parent container dashboard UI.
      taskName - Descriptive name.
      backgroundTask - Logic to run in background.
      onDone - Success callback (EDT).
      onError - Error callback (EDT).

      taskName - Descriptive name.
      backgroundTask - Logic to run in background.

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the task execution on the designated professional executor. Registers with SwingTaskManager for UI observability.

    • handleCompletion

      private void handleCompletion()
      Propagates results or errors to the EDT callbacks.

    • cancel

      public void cancel(boolean mayInterruptIfRunning)
      Cancels the background task.
      Parameters:
      mayInterruptIfRunning - whether to interrupt the thread.

    • isCancelled

      public boolean isCancelled()
      Checks if this background task has been cancelled.
      Returns:
      true if the task was cancelled.

    • isDone

      public boolean isDone()
      Checks if this background task has finished execution.
      Returns:
      true if the task has completed.
